programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: Deadly Dynasty
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones 5
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a journalist of the New York Times, returns to high-profile crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Conducts its own investigations.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones 5
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a journalist of the New York Times, returns to high-profile crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Conducts its own investigations.

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body
programme.desc: The program shows the extremes to which murderers can go to avoid punishment.Each episode presents the stories of criminals who will do anything to hide their crimes and get rid of their victims.

credits.actor: Self - Former Prosecutor Cuyahoga County Prosecutors Office - Tim McGinty

programme.title: How (Not) to Get Rid of a Body
programme.desc: The program shows the extremes to which murderers can go to avoid punishment.Each episode presents the stories of criminals who will do anything to hide their crimes and get rid of their victims.

credits.actor: Self - Former Prosecutor Cuyahoga County Prosecutors Office - Tim McGinty

programme.title: I Went Undercover
programme.desc: True stories of ordinary people who secretly helped police investigate murders.Viewers will learn behind the scenes of their courageous and dedicated work.

programme.title: I Went Undercover
programme.desc: True stories of ordinary people who secretly helped police investigate murders.Viewers will learn behind the scenes of their courageous and dedicated work.

programme.title: Disappeared 8
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of disappearance investigations.Viewers will learn about the psychological portraits and everyday habits of each character in the episode.This helps determine whether the person disappeared of their own accord.

programme.title: Disappeared 8
programme.sub-title: On the way to the airport
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of disappearance investigations.Viewers will learn about the psychological portraits and everyday habits of each character in the episode.This helps determine whether the person disappeared of their own accord.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: The series presents difficult-to-solve crime puzzles.Their unraveling will only be possible by reconstructing the last moments of the victim's life.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Shocking stories about crimes that happened in small Central American cities.They divided the local inhabitants forever.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Well-known and experienced policeman Joe Kenda reveals the behind-the-scenes of the most brutal and strangest crimes committed in the USA.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates 3
programme.desc: The third series of stories about crime cases that gained notoriety by being published in magazines.Journalists reveal the behind-the-scenes of the crime and present the profile of the criminal.

programme.title: Deadly Influence: The Social Media Murders
programme.desc: The program will present sometimes shocking crime stories whose main characters are influencers and entire communities present on social media.

programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Stories of people who realize that they have been dealing with a murderer for years.Suddenly they are faced with a choice between loyalty and justice.They must decide which side to choose.
